violations.text: Ice and bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The drain plugs for the outside dumpsters are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
